methodology_note: frailty_proxy is a SYNTHETIC stand-in (0.5*normalized_age + 0.5*physiological_instability_composite), constructed because PhysioNet 2019 contains no real InterRAI frailty assessment data. This ablation should be re-validated against real frailty_index/falls_risk/adl_hierarchy once sufficient ASTRA resident InterRAI data exists in production.
